edges.declaration_example: I take the subway because I live in Quivira Springs. There's no subway line in Thornvale Crossing — people just drive there.
The nice thing about living in Quivira Springs is I'm only 20 minutes from the office. If I lived further out it'd be way longer.
I go to Zefiro's Kitchen all the time — it's right around the corner from my apartment in Quivira Springs.
I work out at Zorathel Peak Gym because it's a 5-minute walk from my place in Quivira Springs.
I see Dr. Hahn every Thursday — her office is in Quivira Springs, close to where I live.
I'm a senior engineer at Zypherix Labs. That's the title they gave me when I joined.
Zypherix Labs is based in Dravenna Point, so that's where I go to work every day.
At Zypherix Labs we do flexible hours — I usually go in around 10.
Right now at Zypherix Labs I'm on the backend migration project.
I get my health insurance through Zypherix Labs — it's an employer plan.
Since our office is in Dravenna Point, I drive to work. There's no real public transit out there.
The Dravenna Point office is about 40 minutes from my apartment.
There's this great taco place near the Dravenna Point office — Velmara Taqueria. I go there for lunch almost every day.
I signed up at Velthari Studio because it's right next to our Dravenna Point office.
Since I was diagnosed with high blood pressure, the doctor put me on Thrynexol.
My doctor said I need to go low-sodium because of my high blood pressure.
I used to do weight training, but my doctor told me to switch to something low-impact because of my back issues.
Ever since the anxiety got worse, I haven't been able to fall asleep before 1am.
I need to see Dr. Patel every two weeks now to monitor my blood pressure.
I switched to swimming, so I signed up at Crysthene Pool instead of the gym.
Ever since I went vegetarian, I've been going to Quirenth Leaf Cafe instead — they have way more options for me.
Now that Sarah and I are engaged, we moved in together.
We needed a bigger place after getting engaged, so we got a two-bedroom apartment.
With the wedding coming up, we're saving for that instead of the house down payment.
We're planning a trip to celebrate our engagement — thinking about Zynthera Bay for a week.
Now that we're engaged, we need to plan the engagement party for next month.
My roommate moved out, so I'm looking at a smaller one-bedroom apartment to save on rent.
Now that I'm splitting rent with my partner, I can put more toward paying off my student loans.
With the new puppy, vet bills are adding up, so I'm putting the vacation fund on hold.
Our building doesn't allow dogs, so we need to find a pet-friendly place.
I'm in a data analytics bootcamp now, so I'm learning Python as part of the coursework.
My evening classes start at 6, so I switched to the early shift at work.
With tuition bills, I'm focused on building an emergency fund rather than investing.
I started taking the bus because it goes straight to campus.

proximity.description: I go to X because it's near where I live/work

infrastructure.description: I do X because Y has/doesn't have Z

distance.description: X is N minutes from Y

company_policy.description: At my company/school, we do X

medical_causation.description: Because of my condition, the doctor said X

life_event.description: Now that X happened, we need to Y

priority_shift.description: With X expense/change, I'm focused on Y instead of Z

activity_facility.description: I switched to X activity, so I need Y facility

schedule_conflict.description: My X is at Y time, so I changed Z
